implement.note: seven endpoints mounted (refresh, logout self+scoped-admin, password, device start/poll/approve, users/:id/password) + three security-review findings hardened in-slice regression-test-first

test.detail: NEW tests/contract/auth.test.ts: 17 cases (13 acceptance + 4 hardening). Full api suite 980 passed/1 skipped; shared 32; web 113. schema-coverage: 7 endpoints PENDING->COVERED, EXPECTED_PENDING_COUNT 72->65

findings.summary: deleted user could re-sign forever via /auth/refresh (stale activation entry)
findings.resolution: fixed: deleteUser clearActivation()s; admission planes fail closed

findings.summary: approved device poll findOne-then-deleteOne could double-mint under a race
password change/admin reset left stolen tokens valid to expiry
findings.resolution: fixed: both bump tokenEpoch; fresh mints pin iat=max(now,epoch) so a same-second re-login is not born invalid

findings.summary: ch03 diagram was a text panel not a state graph
findings.resolution: fixed: replaced with nodes + edges (login/refresh/live, four kill paths, device sub-flow)

adversarialReview.evidence: reviewer independently ran contract suite (18 files/156 tests exit 0), typecheck 0, gate:chokepoint clean, verified requireAuth ordering, cross-org non-enumeration, device single-use + entropy, module direction (routes import no data/)

codexSliceReview.detail: OWED for this security-boundary slice (the F1 brief names adversarial Codex review). codex CLI reports 'Not logged in' (exit 2) on this host and interactive login is impossible mid-run; no API-key auth configured. Recorded degraded per Part 3 - never blocks, never faked. The fresh-context Anthropic review (approve, 3 findings all fixed) covered the slice; a run-level codex checkpoint is owed if credentials appear

adversarialTest.detail: api slice: batched run-level independent pass owed before the terminal verdict (Part 8.2)

video.verification: cast self-verified by grep: 'Tests  17 passed' + the hardening case names present
